# truenas_iscsi_targetextent (Resource)

Manages a TrueNAS iSCSI target-to-extent association.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "truenas_iscsi_targetextent" "example" {
  target = truenas_iscsi_target.example.id
  extent = truenas_iscsi_extent.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `extent` (Number) The extent ID.
- `target` (Number) The target ID.

### Optional

- `lunid` (Number) The LUN ID. Auto-assigned if omitted.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the target-extent association.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import truenas_iscsi_targetextent.example 1
```
